Title: Retro Pop Art Bob Hair Graphic Tee on Black T-Shirt
Description:
Capture a modern, vibrant aesthetic with this unique pop art graphic t-shirt. Featuring a stylized portrait of a woman with elegant white bob hair and striking blue eyes, this design is perfect for adding a bold artistic touch to any wardrobe.

  • Bold Graphics: The illustration showcases a fashionable figure in a cozy yellow knit sweater and black turtleneck, set against a refreshing teal background, giving it a highly artistic, retro pop vibe.
  • Premium Comfort: Printed on a soft, durable black t-shirt, this tee ensures all-day comfort while making a major fashion statement.
  • Style Versatility: Whether you're attending a casual brunch, hitting a themed market, or just want a comfortable statement piece, this shirt is designed to be a conversation starter.

This tee is an ideal gift for art lovers, fashionistas, and anyone who appreciates bold, nostalgic, and creative graphic designs. Pair it with high-waisted jeans or a denim skirt for a perfect street-style look.

Details:

Color: Black with vibrant yellow, white, and teal printing.
